items.title: Saint-Maximin leaves América after kids 'abused'
items.summary: Former Newcastle winger Allan Saint-Maximin has left Mexican side Club America by mutual consent after claiming that his children were the victims of racist abuse.

items.title: Sources: Chelsea recall Sarr, send out Anselmino
items.summary: Chelsea will recall Mamadou Sarr from his loan at sister club Strasbourg and sent Aaron Anselmino to France in a swap deal before the end of the transfer window on Monday, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Carrick hails 'big talent' Sesko after United winn...
items.summary: Michael Carrick called Benjamin Sesko a "big talent" after the Manchester United forward climbed off the substitutes' bench to score a stoppage-time winner in the 3-2 Old Trafford victory against Fulham.

items.title: Lang debuteert met basisplaats en grote zege bij Galatasaray
items.summary: Noa Lang heeft zondagavond zijn debuut gemaakt in het shirt van Galatasaray. Met de winteraanwinst in de basis boekte de koploper van de Süper Lig een ruime overwinning op Kayserispor.

items.title: VI Live: Volendam op jacht naar gelijkmaker tegen tiental Go Ahead
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zondag 1 februari. Hier nemen we je mee in drie Eredivisie-duels, een topper in Engeland en alle andere hoogtepunten op de (inter)nationale velden.

items.title: Wintertransfers Eredivisie seizoen 2025/26: alle clubs op een rij
items.summary: De transferperiode is weer losgebarsten. In dit overzicht van VI vind je alle afgeronde, door clubs bevestigde, wintertransfers van de achttien Eredivisie-clubs. Clubs in Nederland kunnen tot en met 3 februari spelers aantrekken .

items.title: NEC presenteert volgende versterking in jacht op topklassering
items.summary: NEC haalt Willum Willumsson per direct terug naar de Eredivisie. De middenvelder komt over van Birmingham City en tekent een verbintenis tot medio 2028 in Nijmegen. NEC heeft een eenzijdige optie om het contract met een jaar te verlengen.

items.title: Casemiro blinkt uit onder Carrick: 'Fraai afscheidstournee bij United'
items.summary: Casemiro is een van de spelers die onder Michael Carrick is opgebloeid bij Manchester United. De Braziliaanse middenvelder is een belangrijke schakel bij de ingezette zegereeks en kreeg na het duel met Fulham complimenten van zijn manager én de media.

items.title: Solanke scorpion kick helps Spurs fight back against Man City
items.summary: Dominic Solanke scores twice, including a spectacular scorpion kick, as Tottenham come from behind to draw against Manchester City with a rousing second-half performance.

items.title: Sesko scores dramatic late winner as Man Utd beat Fulham
items.summary: Manchester United avoided Fulham's late comeback due to a Benjamin Sesko goal in stoppage time to give United three points and continue head coach Michael Carrick's perfect start.

items.title: Sarr earns Palace draw at Forest as Williams sees red for handball
items.summary: Neco Williams is sent off for deliberate handball in Nottingham Forest's draw with Crystal Palace, as he punched Jefferson Lerma's goalbound header off the line.

items.title: 10-man Brentford hold on for hard-fought win at Villa
items.summary: Brentford hold on to an important win against Aston Villa, despite Kevin Schade's sending off during the first half.

items.title: Carrick's calm amid the chaos is exactly what Man ...
items.summary: Michael Carrick has three wins from three games in charge at Man United.

items.title: Premier League title-race twist: Questions for Man...
items.summary: The momentum has shifted in the Premier League title race again as Man City wasted a two-goal lead at Tottenham. How did that happen?

items.title: Is Carrick proving Amorim's Man Utd tenure was a wasted year?
items.summary: A third win in a row for Michael Carrick highlights the failures of Ruben Amorim's time at Manchester United.

items.title: Solanke dents Manchester City’s title hopes with stirring comeback for Spurs
items.summary: At the end of a wild occasion, this the definition of the game of two halves, it was difficult to state the case for Manchester City’s Premier League title-winning aspirations with any confidence. The manner of their second-half capitulation saw to that. If they were impressive before the interval, they were so brittle thereafter, blown off course after Tottenham stirred. Pep Guardiola was beside himself with frustration on the touchline. The City manager has now seen his team drop seven points since the turn of the year with goals they have conceded in the second half of matches. After a fourth draw in six league matches, a run that has included the defeat by Manchester United, City find themselves six points behind the leaders, Arsenal. Continue reading...

items.title: World Masters darts LIVE! Humphries leads Van Veen after Littler wins EPIC
Sensational Solanke SCORPION KICK completes Spurs comeback to STUN City
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Spurs’ match against Manchester City in the Premier League.

items.title: Championship talking points: Are Middlesbrough now promotion favourites as Coventry slip again?
Banton clubs England to T20 series win on record day for Buttler
items.summary: Jos Buttler's record-setting 402nd England appearance came in a series-sealing victory as captain Harry Brook's cameo and Tom Banton's half-century smoked the tourists to a six-wicket win in a rain-trimmed second T20 against Sri Lanka in Pallekele.
